member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.BinaryFilterExpression
member.summary: Represents a binary filter expression that combines two operands (left and right) with a binary operator (e.g., equality, comparison, logical).

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.BinaryFilterExpression.#ctor(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified left and right operands and expression type.
member.param: The left operand of the binary expression.
The right operand of the binary expression.
The type of the binary expression.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.BinaryFilterExpression.Left
member.summary: Gets the left operand of the binary expression.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.BinaryFilterExpression.Right
member.summary: Gets the right operand of the binary expression.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.ConstantFilterExpression
member.summary: Represents a constant value expression within a filter tree.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.ConstantFilterExpression.#ctor(System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified constant value.
member.param: The constant value of the expression, or null.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.ConstantFilterExpression.Value
member.summary: Gets the constant value of this expression.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FilterEvaluationException
member.summary: An exception thrown when the evaluation of a filter fails

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterEvaluationException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the exception.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterEvaluationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the exception with a message that describes the error.
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterEvaluationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the exception with a message that describes the error and the exception that caused it.
member.param: A message that describes the error.
The exception that caused the error.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FilterException
member.summary: An exception thrown when a filter is not valid.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterException.#ctor
member.summary: Constructs the exception.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructs the exception with the given message.
member.param: The message of the exception.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Constructs the exception with the given message and inner exception.
member.param: The message of the exception.
The inner exception of this exception.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression
member.summary: Represents a default implementation of a filter that can be used to restrict the result of a query.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.ExpressionType
member.summary: Gets the type of filter.

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Empty
member.summary: An empty filter that has no effect on the result.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.IsEmpty
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this filter expression is empty.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.IsValidReference(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified variable name is a valid filter variable reference.
member.param: The variable name to validate.
member.returns: Returns true if the variable name is not null or whitespace and contains only letters, digits, underscores, or dots; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Unary(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType)
member.summary: Creates a new unary filter with the given operand and filter type.
member.param: The operand of the unary filter.
The type of the unary filter.
member.returns: Returns a new with the given operand and of the given type.
member.exception: Thrown when is not a unary filter type.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Not(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Creates an unary filter that negates the given operand.
member.param: The filter operand to negate.
member.returns: Returns a new that negates the given filter operand.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Binary(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType)
member.summary: Creates a new binary filter with the given left and right operands
member.param: The left operand of the binary filter.
The right operand of the binary filter.
The type of the binary filter.
member.returns: Returns a new of the given type with the given left and right operands.
member.exception: Thrown when is not a valid binary filter type.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.And(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Creates a binary filter that combines two operands with a logical AND.
member.param: The left operand.
The right operand.
member.returns: Returns a new with .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Or(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Creates a binary filter that combines two operands with a logical OR.
member.param: The left operand.
The right operand.
member.returns: Returns a new with .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Equal(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Creates a binary filter that compares two operands for equality.
member.param: The left operand.
The right operand.
member.returns: Returns a new with .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.NotEquals(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Creates a binary filter that compares two operands for inequality.
member.param: The left operand.
The right operand.
member.returns: Returns a new with .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.GreaterThan(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Creates a binary filter that checks if the left operand is greater than the right.
member.param: The left operand.
The right operand.
member.returns: Returns a new with .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.GreaterThanOrEqual(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Creates a binary filter that checks if the left operand is greater than or equal to the right.
member.param: The left operand.
The right operand.
member.returns: Returns a new with .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.LessThan(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Creates a binary filter that checks if the left operand is less than the right.
member.param: The left operand.
The right operand.
member.returns: Returns a new with .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.LessThanOrEqual(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Creates a binary filter that checks if the left operand is less than or equal to the right.
member.param: The left operand.
The right operand.
member.returns: Returns a new with .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Function(Deveel.Filters.VariableFilterExpression,System.String,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression[])
member.summary: Creates a function filter expression that invokes the specified function on the given variable with the provided arguments.
member.param: The variable on which the function is invoked.
The name of the function to invoke.
The arguments to pass to the function.
member.returns: Returns a new .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Function(Deveel.Filters.VariableFilterExpression,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a function filter expression that invokes the specified function on the given variable with no arguments.
member.param: The variable on which the function is invoked.
The name of the function to invoke.
member.returns: Returns a new with no arguments.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Constant(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a constant filter expression with the specified value.
member.param: The constant value, or null.
member.returns: Returns a new wrapping the given value.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression.Variable(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a variable filter expression referencing the specified variable name.
member.param: The name of the variable to reference.
member.returns: Returns a new for the given variable name.
member.exception: Thrown when is null, whitespace, or not a valid variable reference.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType
member.summary: Enumerates the types of filters that are known

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.Equal
member.summary: A filter that compares two parties for equality

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.NotEqual
member.summary: A filter that compares two parties for inequality

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.GreaterThan
member.summary: Compares two parties to determine if the first part is greater than the second one.

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.GreaterThanOrEqual
member.summary: Compares two parties to determine if the first part is greater or equal to the second one.

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.LessThan
member.summary: Compares two parties to determine if the first part is less than the second one.

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.LessThanOrEqual
member.summary: Compares two parties to determine if the first part is less than or equal to the second one.

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.And
member.summary: A logical AND between two filters

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.Or
member.summary: A logical OR between two filters

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.Not
member.summary: An unary filter that negates the result of another filter

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.Function
member.summary: The invocation of a function that returns a boolean value

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.Constant
member.summary: A constant and immutable value.

member.name: F:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType.Variable
member.summary: The reference to a variable in the filter context.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionVisitor
member.summary: Provides a base visitor for traversing and transforming a tree.
member.remarks: Subclasses can override individual Visit* methods to customize behavior for specific expression types.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionVisitor.Visit(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression)
member.summary: Visits the specified filter expression and dispatches to the appropriate typed visit method based on its .
member.param: The filter expression to visit.
member.returns: The resulting after visiting.
member.exception: Thrown when the expression type is not supported by this visitor.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionVisitor.VisitFunctionArguments(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression})
member.summary: Visits the arguments of a function filter expression.
member.param: The list of argument expressions, or null.
member.returns: A new list of visited argument expressions.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionVisitor.VisitFunction(Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterExpression)
member.summary: Visits a function filter expression.
member.param: The function filter expression to visit.
member.returns: The resulting after visiting.
member.exception: Thrown when the visited variable is not a .

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionVisitor.VisitConstant(Deveel.Filters.ConstantFilterExpression)
member.summary: Visits a constant filter expression.
member.param: The constant filter expression to visit.
member.returns: A new with the same value.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionVisitor.VisitVariable(Deveel.Filters.VariableFilterExpression)
member.summary: Visits a variable filter expression.
member.param: The variable filter expression to visit.
member.returns: A new with the same variable name.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionVisitor.VisitUnary(Deveel.Filters.UnaryFilterExpression)
member.summary: Visits a unary filter expression.
member.param: The unary filter expression to visit.
member.returns: The resulting after visiting the operand.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionVisitor.VisitBinary(Deveel.Filters.BinaryFilterExpression)
member.summary: Visits a binary filter expression.
member.param: The binary filter expression to visit.
member.returns: The resulting after visiting both operands.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for to build lambda expressions, evaluate filters, and perform asynchronous evaluation.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.AsLambda``1(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,System.String)
member.summary: Produces a lambda expression that represents the filter.
member.typeparam: The type of the parameter of the expression.
member.param: The filter expression to convert to a lambda.
The name of the parameter to use in the expression. Note: this name must match the variable references in the filter.
member.returns: Returns a that represents the expression tree of the filter, that can be used to compile a delegate.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.AsLambda(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Produces a lambda expression that represents the filter
member.param: The filter to convert to a lambda expression.
The type of the parameter of the expression.
The name of the parameter to use in the expression. Note: this name must match the variable references in the filter.
member.returns: Returns a that represents the expression tree of the filter, that can be used to compile a delegate.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.AsAsyncLambda(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Produces an asynchrounous lambda expression that represents the filter
member.param: The type of the parameter of the expression.
The name of the parameter to use in the expression. Note: this name must match the variable references in the filter.
member.returns: Returns a that represents the expression tree of the filter, that can be used to compile an asynchrouns delegate.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.AsAsyncLambda``1(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,System.String)
member.summary: Produces an asynchrounous lambda expression that represents the filter
member.typeparam: The type of the parameter of the expression.
member.param: The name of the parameter to use in the expression. Note: this name must match the variable references in the filter.
member.returns: Returns a that represents the expression tree of the filter, that can be used to compile an asynchrouns delegate.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.Evaluate(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,System.Type,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Compiles and evaluates the filter against the given parameter value.
member.param: The type of the parameter to use in the evaluation.
The name of the parameter to use in the evaluation.
The value of the parameter to use in the evaluation.
member.returns: Returns true if the given value matches the filter, otherwise it returns false.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.
Thrown when the filter cannot be evaluated because of an unhandled error.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.Evaluate(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,System.Type,System.Object)
member.summary: Compiles and evaluates the filter against the given parameter value.
member.param: The type of the parameter to use in the evaluation.
The value of the parameter to use in the evaluation.
member.returns: Returns true if the given value matches the filter, otherwise

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.Evaluate``1(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Compiles and evaluates the filter against the given typed parameter value.
member.param: The filter expression to evaluate.
The name of the parameter used in the filter.
The value to evaluate against the filter.
member.returns: Returns true if the value matches the filter; otherwise false.
member.exception: Thrown when the filter cannot be evaluated.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.Evaluate``1(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,``0)
member.summary: Compiles and evaluates the filter against the given typed parameter value, using the default parameter name "x".
member.param: The filter expression to evaluate.
The value to evaluate against the filter.
member.returns: Returns true if the value matches the filter; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.EvaluateAsync(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,System.Type,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Asynchronously compiles and evaluates the filter against the given parameter value.
member.param: The filter expression to evaluate.
The type of the parameter.
The name of the parameter used in the filter.
The value to evaluate against the filter.
member.returns: A that resolves to true if the value matches; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.EvaluateAsync``1(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Asynchronously compiles and evaluates the filter against the given typed parameter value.
member.param: The filter expression to evaluate.
The name of the parameter used in the filter.
The value to evaluate against the filter.
member.returns: A that resolves to true if the value matches; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FilterExtensions.EvaluateAsync``1(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,``0)
member.summary: Asynchronously compiles and evaluates the filter against the given typed parameter value, using the default parameter name "x".
member.param: The filter expression to evaluate.
The value to evaluate against the filter.
member.returns: A that resolves to true if the value matches; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterExpression
member.summary: The invocation to a function that returns a boolean for filtering

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterExpression.#ctor(Deveel.Filters.VariableFilterExpression,System.String,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The variable that defines the function to invoke.
The name of the function to invoke.
An optional array of arguments to pass to the function. Each argument must be either a or a .
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty, or when any argument is not a constant or variable expression.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterExpression.FunctionName
member.summary: Gets the name of the function to invoke, that is defined by the object refereced by

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterExpression.Variable
member.summary: Gets the variable that references the object that defines the function to invoke

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.FunctionFilterExpression.Arguments
member.summary: Gets the arguments to pass to the function.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.JsonElementUtil
member.summary: Provides utility methods for converting values to and from and for building filter expressions from JSON data.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.JsonElementUtil.ToElement(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts the specified value to a .
member.param: The value to convert, or null.
member.returns: A representing the given value.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.JsonElementUtil.BuildFilter(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonElement},Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType)
member.summary: Builds a composite from a dictionary of JSON key-value pairs, combining them with the specified logical operator.
member.param: A dictionary of field names to JSON values.
The comparison type to apply to each key-value pair.
The logical operator used to combine multiple comparisons (default is ).
member.returns: A representing the combined filter.
member.exception: Thrown when is not a logical type, or is not a comparison type.
Thrown when no filter can be built from the given data.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.JsonElementUtil.InferValue(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Infers a CLR value from the specified .
member.param: The JSON element to infer the value from, or null.
member.returns: The inferred CLR value, or null if the element is null, , or .
member.exception: Thrown when the JSON element contains an unsupported value kind.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.JsonFilterConverter
member.summary: A that serializes and deserializes instances to and from JSON.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.UnaryFilterExpression
member.summary: Represents a unary filter expression that applies an operator to a single operand (e.g., logical negation).

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.UnaryFilterExpression.#ctor(Deveel.Filters.FilterExpression,Deveel.Filters.FilterExpressionType)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified operand and expression type.
member.param: The operand of the unary expression.
The type of the unary expression.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.UnaryFilterExpression.Operand
member.summary: Gets the operand of the unary expression.

member.name: T:Deveel.Filters.VariableFilterExpression
member.summary: Represents a variable reference expression within a filter tree, pointing to a named field or property of the filtered object.

member.name: M:Deveel.Filters.VariableFilterExpression.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified variable name.
member.param: The name of the variable referenced by this expression.

member.name: P:Deveel.Filters.VariableFilterExpression.VariableName
member.summary: Gets the name of the variable referenced by this expression.
